Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

So LUSTRE_OSS_NAME is "ost".  That's not confusing at all.
I think OST stood for Object Storage Target.  So what is OSS ?? Object Storage Service?
That means OSS_SERVICE_WATCHDOG_FACTOR is the Object Storage Service SERVICE WATCHDOG FACTOR.  Again, not confusing at all.

but none of that was introduced by this patch - this patch just helped me to see it.

This patch I like.

commit.subject: LU-14291 ofd: merge ost module into ofd
commit.message:
LU-14291 ofd: merge ost module into ofd

The ost module is very small and its very similar to the mds class
which is embedded in the mdt module. We can do the same thing with
the ost module. Merge it into the ofd module.

Test-Parameters: trivial
